jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at 3M India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
